title: Handcrafted Boards Compat
description: Datapack to add stone cutter recipes for Handcrafted's boards for each wood type.
body:
This data pack makes Handcrafted's boards obtainable through the stone cutter instead of throwing the boards on top. This is in case other mods change the functionality of the stone cutter like Spelunkery.
Gives 2 boards per plank.
